title: Form validation with embedded schema + custom validations
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/survey_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.SurveyLive). The survey form is backed by an embedded_schema MyApp.Survey.Form with fields :age (integer), :consent (boolean), :comments (string). changeset/2 must validate_required([:age, :consent]), validate_number(:age, greater_than_or_equal_to: 18), validate_acceptance(:consent, message: "must accept"). LiveView uses to_form + action :validate. Render <.form> with <.input> components.
tier_rationale: Full form setup with embedded schema pattern.
